linux-terminal-fundamentals.title: Linux Terminal Fundamentals
linux-terminal-fundamentals.description: A beginner-friendly Linux course focused on terminal navigation, files, folders, safe command habits, and workspace-based practice.
linux-terminal-fundamentals.moreComingSoon: More Linux lessons are coming soon.

linux-1-terminal-navigation.title: Terminal Navigation Basics
linux-1-terminal-navigation.description: Learn what the terminal is, how to know where you are, how to list files, and how to move between folders.
outcomes: Explain what a terminal command does.
Use pwd and ls to inspect the current location.
Use cd, ., .., and ~ to move around safely.
Create a simple folder map using terminal commands.
why: Builds comfort with the terminal before scripts or servers.
Gives learners real command practice with immediate file explorer feedback.

linux-2-files-and-folders.title: Files, Folders, and Viewing Content
linux-2-files-and-folders.description: Create, copy, move, rename, delete, and inspect files from the terminal.
outcomes: Create folders and files with mkdir, mkdir -p, and touch.
Copy, move, and rename files using cp and mv.
Use safe deletion habits with rm.
Inspect text files with cat, head, tail, and wc.
why: Turns command memorization into visible workspace changes.
Prepares learners for Bash scripts, Git, SSH, and server work.

linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-1-orie.title: Terminal Orientation
linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-1-orie.description: Start with the terminal prompt, current directory, listing files, and moving between folders.

linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-1-modu.title: Module Project
linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-1-modu.description: Build a simple terminal map that proves you can create and navigate a nested workspace.
bullets: Place files in the right folders
Verify structure with ls and pwd

linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-2-file.title: File Workflow
linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-2-file.description: Practice the commands developers use every day to build and organize project folders.

linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-2-modu.title: Module Project
linux-terminal-fundamentals-linux-2-modu.description: Organize a messy notes folder into a clean school workspace.
